close_reason: Added backticks around OnceLock and SubjectPublicKeyInfo
description:
Locations: secretx-pkcs11/src/lib.rs:459 ("OnceLock" without backticks), 520 ("SubjectPublicKeyInfo" without backticks).

clippy::doc_markdown flags both. Backticks on type/identifier names in rustdoc improve rendering (monospace) and signal "this is a Rust identifier" vs prose.

Suggested fix:
    line 459: "Algorithm detection (cold OnceLock)" -> "Algorithm detection (cold `OnceLock`)"
    line 520: "Return the DER-encoded SubjectPublicKeyInfo" -> "Return the DER-encoded `SubjectPublicKeyInfo`"

Tiny fix, no functional impact. Mark as opinion if team doesn't enforce doc_markdown via lint.
title: Missing backticks on OnceLock and SubjectPublicKeyInfo in rustdoc
